summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Trekhievers clone website. Backend APIs are fully functional with 100% test success rate. Frontend UI loads correctly with all major components working. Minor authentication state persistence issue identified during booking flow.

ui_bugs.issue: User gets redirected to auth page during booking flow despite successful login
Timeout when clicking 'Trekking' option in category filter

integration_issues.issue: Search for 'Kashmir' returns 0 results - might be case-sensitive or missing data

passed_tests: All 25 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Homepage loading with all sections (hero, featured tours, destinations, testimonials)
Tours listing page with search and basic filtering
Tour detail page with pricing, itinerary, reviews display
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication state persistence issue in frontend - users are getting redirected to auth page during booking flow despite successful login. Also investigate search case-sensitivity and filter dropdown implementation.
